description_long: This is a spacious, modern bungalow set within a walled rectangular lot featuring a lush green lawn. The main building has two stories, a dark gabled roof, and a combination of white and stone-textured exterior walls. The front facade includes a covered entryway with columns, a prominent gate, and a driveway leading to a detached garage with a slatted roof. Several large windows are distributed across the structure, with a mix of single and grouped arrangements, and a covered patio area is visible at the rear. The property is bordered by a stone and concrete fence, and the landscaping includes a few trees and shrubs near the entrance. The overall design blends contemporary and traditional elements, with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical layout.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, white and stone-textured walls, a detached garage, and a walled green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, gate, driveway, detached garage, and symmetrical facade with prominent windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the depth of the lot with the stone fence and green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, large backyard, and the back elevation with grouped windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, roofline, and the expanse of the lawn within the fenced property.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
